message:
fix(self_stabilize): use Option for Patch removal markers instead of empty Vec

ReconcileMessage::Patch and RoundResult::ApplyPatch previously used
Vec<(Vec<u8>, Vec<u8>)> where empty byte vectors represented deletions.
This was semantically incorrect — a legitimate empty value would be
indistinguishable from a deletion request, causing data loss during
Merkle-tree reconciliation.

Changed to Vec<(Vec<u8>, Option<Vec<u8>>)>:
- Some(value) = insert/update the entry
- None = remove the entry (tombstone)

Updated authority-side diff computation and non-authority patch
application logic. Updated proptest strategies to wrap entries in Some.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
